text:
いざ、自分が戦っていると
冷静に動きを見ている時間がなくてさ。

見て学ぶ、的なあれ。
誰かにお願いしたいと思ってたんだ。

まあ、誰かって、そんなの頼めるの
<%me>しか
いないんだけどな。

ということで、近寄ってくるヤツらの
動き方とか戦い方とか確認させてくれ！
よろし

I mean, we can't really calmly observe the
enemy's movements while we're fighting them.

Watch an' learn, as they say.
So I was thinking of asking someone for help
with the "watch" part.

And when I say "someone", I mean
we both know it can only be you,
<%me>

If you wouldn't mind, let me watch
the movements and the fighting
styles of the enemies that approach!
